title: Commercialise research and technology product or idea
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Commercialise research and technology product or idea demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Investigate commercialisation options

pcs.text: Describe product/innovation to be commercialised 1.2 Analyse innovation alignment against organisation's innovation objectives1.3 Research, analyse and test market opportunities1.4 Investigate optimum business structure and funding options
